description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a sleek, modern design, featuring a metallic silver upper and a white textured rubber sole. The shoe has a smooth synthetic or leather-like finish, with metallic eyelets for laces but no laces present. The heel area is reinforced with a white patch, and the brand name appears printed on the back. The interior is padded for comfort, and the tongue is integrated into the upper, giving it a slip-on appearance. The sole has a diamond-patterned texture for grip, and the overall construction suggests a lightweight, casual urban shoe.
description: A metallic silver low-top sneaker with a white textured sole, metallic eyelets, and a slip-on design. The shoe features a smooth finish and visible branding on the heel.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the white heel patch with visible branding and the diamond-patterned sole.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the metallic silver upper, absence of laces, and the full length of the textured sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the integrated tongue, metallic eyelets, and the smooth, rounded toe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the metallic upper and white heel patch.
